crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE APT CozyCar SSL Cert 5
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE APT CozyCar SSL Cert 5"; flow:established,from_server; tls.cert_subject; content:"extranet.qualityplanning.com"; fast_pattern; reference:url,researchcenter.paloaltonetworks.com/2015/07/tracking-minidionis-cozycars-new-ride-is-related-to-seaduke/; classtype:targeted-activity; sid:2021422; rev:3; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2015_07_15, deployment Perimeter, former_category MALWARE, signature_severity Major, tag SSL_Malicious_Cert, updated_at 2022_03_28;)

alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP Destination Unreachable Network Unreachable"; icode:0; itype:3; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:401; rev:9; )

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Diagnostic Library Sdiageng.DLL Loaded By Msdt.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects both of CVE-2022-30190 (Follina) and DogWalk vulnerabilities exploiting msdt.exe binary to load the "sdiageng.dll" library
Detects process creation events that use the Sysnative folder (common for CobaltStrike spawns)

values.Description: Microsoft Windows Media Player Setup Utility

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: PowerShell Core DLL Loaded By Non PowerShell Process
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects loading of essential DLLs used by PowerShell by non-PowerShell process.
Detects behavior similar to meterpreter's "load powershell" extension.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Tom Kern, oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, Tim Shelton, Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects signs of potential use of the WSMAN provider from uncommon processes locally and remote execution.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Use Short Name Path in Command Line
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect use of the Windows 8.3 short name. Which could be used as a method to avoid command-line detection

Detects modification of the registry settings used for Internet Explorer and other Windows components that use these settings. An attacker can abuse this registry key to add a domain to the trusted sites Zone or insert javascript for persistence
Get the processes that are running on the local computer.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Code integrity failures may indicate tampered executables.

Detects the creation of an executable by another executable

attributes.magic: PE32 executable for MS Windows (GUI) Intel 80386 32-bit

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Use Short Name Path in Command Line
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect use of the Windows 8.3 short name. Which could be used as a method to avoid command-line detection
Detects unusual processes accessing desktop.ini, which can be leveraged to alter how Explorer displays a folder's content (i.e. renaming files) without changing them on disk.

Detects modification of the registry settings used for Internet Explorer and other Windows components that use these settings. An attacker can abuse this registry key to add a domain to the trusted sites Zone or insert javascript for persistence
